description_long: This is a modern, multi-story house with a flat roof and clean, angular lines, featuring extensive use of wood and glass. The house includes a spacious wraparound deck with glass railings, an outdoor pool, and multiple seating areas with umbrellas and potted plants. Large sliding doors and windows provide ample natural light and connect the interior to the outdoor living spaces. The upper level has a smaller footprint, creating a stepped appearance, and includes a rooftop terrace. The main entry is accessible via a set of wooden steps surrounded by landscaping rocks. The overall design emphasizes open, airy spaces and a strong connection to the outdoors.
description: A modern, multi-level house with flat roofs, large windows, wraparound wooden decks, and outdoor amenities like a pool and seating areas. The design features clean lines, glass railings, and a rooftop terrace.
description_view_0: Side view showing the main deck with a pool, umbrella seating area, and large sliding doors opening to the interior.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entry steps, central deck, and the vertical arrangement of windows and terraces.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the extended deck, glass railings, and a shaded outdoor dining area.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the entry steps, landscaping rocks, and the tiered structure of the house with visible rooftop features.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large sliding doors and picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features wooden steps, a simple door, and is flanked by landscaping rocks and a deck with glass railings.
